landing.tagline: Convert your sheet music to dark mode
landing.description: Reading sheet music on screen at night, or on a dark stage, with the traditional white background is exhausting for your eyes. Dark Score intelligently inverts the colors of your PDFs and images: it removes scan noise, thickens staff lines, and applies the color scheme you prefer.

privacy.badge: Your scores never leave your device
privacy.body: We understand your scores are important to you. That is why this site never copies or sends your files to any external server. All processing happens directly in your browser, with no external connections.

upload.hint: or click to select · PDF, PNG, JPG · max. {{size}} MB · multiple files supported
upload.privacy: Your scores never leave your device
upload.errorFormat: Unsupported format. Please use PDF, PNG or JPG.

controls.label: Adjustments
controls.dilationWarning: High level: notes in dense passages may bleed together.
